title: India's Jungle Heroes
desc: Conservation specialists work diligently to ensure the welfare of animals and develop strategies to meet the challenges of promoting human-wildlife coexistence.

title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
desc: Luke Nguyen, a professional chef, embarks on a culinary expedition in Asia to explore a variety of delicious recipes and authentic cuisines.

title: Bering Sea Gold
desc: A group of enthusiasts dives into the frigid ocean in search of gold and also lays their hands on other precious items hidden at the seabed.

title: Primal Survivor: Extreme African Safari
desc: A survival expert takes on the challenge of trekking through the treacherous terrain of the Great Rift Valley to witness Africa's majestic wildlife.

desc: The hosts visit destinations around the world to safely capture some of the most dangerous snake species, often relocating them to more suitable habitats.

title: Europe From Above
desc: The filmmaker explores the beautiful landscapes of several European countries from the air. Through modern hyper-lapse photography, the filmmaker showcases the change in seasons in seconds.

desc: Celebrity Chef Gordon Ramsay travels around the world to immerse himself into different cultures and cuisines. He then interacts with local chefs to learn and compete with them.
